mixed.scenario: Hays Recruitment invoice for $4,200 — supply of temporary administration officer for 3 weeks.
mixed.explain: Agency personnel are ALWAYS 73214. 71113 is for staff directly engaged by Council via payroll — never for agency invoices.

mixed.scenario: Invoice from Cleanaway for monthly domestic wheelie bin collection — $14,320.
mixed.explain: Domestic bin collection = 73122 Garbage Collection. Greenwaste processing = 73129. General waste to landfill = 73130.

mixed.scenario: Austspray Pty Ltd — zone mowing contract payment, $8,450.
mixed.explain: Mowing and landscaping services = 73126 Landscapers & Gardeners. Austspray is a known mowing/landscaping vendor.

mixed.scenario: Go Via motorway toll invoice for Council vehicles — $387.
mixed.explain: Tollway charges = 73535. NOT 73531 (taxi/parking). NOT 73533 (interstate travel).

mixed.scenario: Purchase of 4 safety vests and 2 hard hats for park maintenance crew — $186.
mixed.explain: Safety equipment = 72113 Safety Equipment & Medical Supplies. Uniforms = 72114. Items under $200 minor equipment = 72111. WHS services = 73125.

mixed.scenario: Griffith University semester fees — reimbursement to staff member under Study Assistance Policy — $3,810.
mixed.explain: University fees reimbursed to staff = 73545 Study Assistance. Training courses = 73544. Conference registration = 73541.

mixed.scenario: AILA annual membership renewal — $495.
mixed.explain: Professional body membership = 73542. Blue cards and licence fees = 73433. Training = 73544.

mixed.scenario: Blue card renewal fee for park ranger — $87.90.
mixed.explain: Blue cards = 73433 Other Fees & Charges. NOT 73542 which is professional body memberships only.

mixed.scenario: Internal venue hire — Logan Entertainment Centre function room for team planning day.
mixed.explain: All internal LCC venue hire = 7B611. External commercial venues only = 73521. Even if used for training, venue hire is 7B611.

mixed.scenario: Cemetery refund — customer cancelled prepaid burial plot arrangement, $2,400 credit.
mixed.explain: Cemetery charges including refunds and credits = 62125 Cemetery Charges. This is a revenue account for all cemetery plot transactions.

mixed.scenario: Contract mowing at Slacks Creek Cemetery — invoice $1,890.
mixed.explain: Mowing at cemeteries = 73126 Landscapers & Gardeners. No cemetery-specific expense accounts exist — standard accounts apply.

mixed.scenario: Queensland Audit Office — annual financial statements audit fee $45,000.
mixed.explain: External financial reporting audit ONLY = 73112. All other audit/investigation = 73116.

mixed.scenario: QLDPSI security patrol invoice — monthly parks security, $23,390.
mixed.explain: Security patrols and alarm monitoring = 73124 Security. NOT 73123 Maintenance Services.

mixed.scenario: Internal water usage charge from LCC Water branch — journal entry $1,240.
mixed.explain: Internal LCC water usage = 7B113. 73314-73317 are for EXTERNAL water/sewer providers only, never for internal LCC charges.

mixed.scenario: Consultant engaged to review branch restructure — written report, 6-month engagement, unsupervised.
mixed.explain: All 4 consultancy elements met: expert knowledge + written recommendations + fixed period + unsupervised = 73601 Management Consultancy.

mixed.scenario: Plumber called to fix burst pipe at depot — one-off job, $2,800.
mixed.explain: Plumbing, pest control, repairs, building contractors = 73123 Maintenance Services. Plumbing is specifically listed in the 73123 description.

mixed.scenario: P-Card purchase — morning tea biscuits for on-site team meeting — $45.
mixed.explain: On-site light refreshments at a working meeting, no alcohol = 73512 Non-FBT. Off-site or alcohol present = 73511.

mixed.scenario: Energex electricity bill for park depot — $4,200.
mixed.explain: External electricity supply = 73312. Internal LCC rates/utilities = 7B111 series. Gas = 73311.

mixed.scenario: Purchase of 20 bags of topsoil for garden bed renovation — $340.
mixed.explain: Topsoil = 72249. Landscape supplies (mulch, turf) = 72231. Chemicals/fertiliser = 72112. Construction materials = 72214.

mixed.scenario: Pest control service at park amenities building — quarterly invoice $890.
mixed.explain: Pest control = 73123 Maintenance Services. Pest control is specifically listed in the 73123 account description.

mixed.scenario: External hire of excavator for drainage work — 3 days, $2,100.
mixed.explain: External excavator hire = 74123. 74183 (Fuel) is RESTRICTED to Plant Fleet Services only — never use 7418x accounts.

mixed.scenario: Telstra mobile phone monthly rental and usage — $1,890.
mixed.explain: Phone rental and usage charges = 73313 Telecommunications. Phone PURCHASES should NOT go to 73313 — use 72314 or 73564.

mixed.scenario: Purchase of new desk and chair for depot office — $780 total.
mixed.explain: Furniture below capitalisation threshold = 72313. NOT 72111 (under $200 only). At or above capitalisation threshold → Asset Register.

mixed.scenario: Cabcharge taxi fare — staff travel to meeting in Brisbane CBD.
mixed.explain: SEQ taxi fares and parking = 73531. Tolls = 73535. Interstate travel = 73533. Intrastate QLD travel = 73532.

mixed.scenario: Staff farewell — morning tea with cake on Council premises, no alcohol.
mixed.explain: On-site farewell morning tea with simple food, no alcohol = 73512. A farewell LUNCH or DINNER (especially off-site or with alcohol) = 73511.

mixed.scenario: Recovery received from insurance claim after vehicle damage — $3,200.
mixed.explain: Insurance RECOVERIES received = 64211 (revenue). Insurance premiums = 73131. Excess/damage payments = 73132-73137.

mixed.scenario: Purchase of herbicide for weed control — $420.
mixed.explain: Chemicals, fertiliser and paints = 72112. Safety equipment = 72113. Minor equipment = 72111.

mixed.scenario: Seek.com job advertisement for park ranger position.
mixed.explain: Recruitment advertising = 73551, coordinated via HR Services. Non-recruitment advertising = 73552. Promotional items = 73553.

mixed.scenario: Internal tip fees — green waste disposal via LCC facility.
mixed.explain: Internal LCC tip fees = 7B122. External greenwaste processing = 73129. External garbage collection = 73122.

mixed.scenario: Fire levy payment on Council-owned building.
mixed.explain: Fire levy on Council properties = 73422. Insurance premiums = 73131. Rates paid to other authorities = 73421.

mixed.scenario: Refund of operational contribution no longer required — $5,000.
mixed.explain: Refund of contributions no longer required = 73412. External contributions = 73411.

mixed.scenario: Ozzie Workwear — outdoor clothing for field staff, $1,200.
mixed.explain: Corporate uniforms and outdoor clothing = 72114. Safety equipment/medical supplies = 72113.

mixed.scenario: Equifax pre-employment background check — $180.
mixed.explain: Pre-employment background checks = 73140. Drug/alcohol testing = 73141. Other fees = 73433.

mixed.scenario: Internal spoils material from LCC quarry — journal entry.
mixed.explain: Internal spoils from LCC = 7B532. External quarry material = 72252. Internal sand = 7B531.

mixed.scenario: Debt collection commission fee — $450.
mixed.explain: Debt collection and commission fees = 73432. Fines/penalties = 73431. Other fees = 73433. Regulatory fees = 73434.

mixed.scenario: Dog food purchase for Council's Animal Management Centre — $210.
mixed.explain: Dog food for Animal Management = 72116. Cat food = 72117. Food for resale = 72122. Minor equipment = 72111.

mixed.scenario: Water meter issued from Council inventory.
mixed.explain: Water meters from inventory = 72115. Water meters from stores = 72331. Plumbing materials = 72213.

mixed.scenario: Bitumen and asphalt for road patching — $3,200.
mixed.explain: Bitumen & asphalt products = 72211. Concrete = 72212. Construction materials = 72214. Landscape supplies = 72231.

mixed.scenario: Road furniture purchase — bollards and park bench — $1,400.
mixed.explain: Roads & parks furniture = 72221. Signs = 72222. Office furniture = 72313. Parks assets = 72315.

mixed.scenario: Signage for park entrance — directional and safety signs — $800.
mixed.explain: Signs for roads and parks = 72222. Roads & parks furniture = 72221. Parks assets = 72315.

mixed.scenario: Waste levy payment to Queensland State Government — $15,000.
mixed.explain: State Government waste levy = 73423. Fire levy = 73422. Rates to other authorities = 73421. External contributions = 73411.

mixed.scenario: Graphic design for park event brochure — $650.
mixed.explain: Multi-media services, photography, graphic design = 73562. Other advertising = 73552. Promotional items = 73553. Printing = 73563.

mixed.scenario: Postage for mailing park permits — $120.
mixed.explain: Postage and courier services = 73565. Other admin = 73561. Printing/stationery = 73563. Telecommunications = 73313.

mixed.scenario: IT software licence renewal — annual fee $2,400.
mixed.explain: IT software licence fees = 73566. IT equipment/applications = 73564. IT consultancies = 73605. Internal IT = 7B411.

mixed.scenario: Internal crushed gravel supply from LCC quarry — journal $890.
mixed.explain: Internal crushed gravel from LCC = 7B521. External crushed gravel = 72241. Internal gravel (general) = 7B520. External gravel = 72240.

mixed.scenario: Drug and alcohol testing for park maintenance crew — $340.
mixed.explain: Drug & alcohol testing = 73141. Pre-employment background checks = 73140. Medical services = 73115. WHS = 73125.

mixed.scenario: Internal vehicle hire from Plant Fleet Services — journal entry.
mixed.explain: Internal vehicle/plant hire from Plant Fleet = 7C111. Internal misc plant = 7C112. External utility hire = 74151. Internal equipment lease = 7B612.

mixed.scenario: Environmental protection activities — weed management materials, $560.
mixed.explain: Environmental protection expenses = 72201. Chemicals/fertiliser = 72112. Landscaping services = 73126. WHS = 73125.

mixed.scenario: Carbon emissions tax permit purchase — $8,000.
mixed.explain: Carbon emissions tax = 73424. Waste levy = 73423. Carbon provision adjustments = 73425. Rates to other authorities = 73421.

traps.scenario: Chandler Macleod invoice — supply of temporary groundskeeper, 4 weeks, $6,200.
traps.explain: TRAP: Agency temps → ALWAYS 73214, never 71113. Chandler Macleod is an employment agency — the person is not on Council payroll.

traps.scenario: On-call leave accrual for park ranger — payroll journal.
traps.explain: TRAP: On-call leave → 71226 Banked RDO / On Call Leave. NOT 71112 Overtime. These are commonly confused.

traps.scenario: Staff Christmas party at external restaurant — $2,400 (alcohol served).
traps.explain: TRAP: Christmas party = ALWAYS 73511 FBT. Off-site + alcohol + social function — every Reason H factor points to 73511.

traps.scenario: DigSafe annual subscription fee — $330.
traps.explain: TRAP: DigSafe = 73433 Other Fees & Charges. NOT 73542 (professional memberships only). This is one of the most common miscodes.

traps.scenario: Training venue hire — Logan Entertainment Centre for full-day WHS training.
traps.explain: TRAP: Internal LCC venue = ALWAYS 7B611, even when used for training. Never 73521 (external only) or 73544 (training content, not venue).

traps.scenario: Electricity bill from Energex — depot supply, $4,200.
traps.explain: TRAP: External electricity = 73312. LCC internal rates/utilities = 7B111 series. These get confused because both are 'utilities'.

traps.scenario: Internal LCC rates and charges journal — $890.
traps.explain: TRAP: Internal LCC rates = 7B111. 73314-73317 are for EXTERNAL providers only — never for internal LCC charges.

traps.scenario: Invoice total $3,000 but the underlying contract value is $45,000 per annum.
traps.explain: TRAP: Threshold is TOTAL CONTRACT VALUE, not invoice amount. $45k total = 73212 Major Contracts, even though this invoice is $3k.

traps.scenario: Cleanaway invoice — but this one is for ELECTRICITY supply, not waste collection.
traps.explain: TRAP: Vendor name can mislead. Cleanaway electricity = 73312. Code based on what's being supplied, not who the vendor is.

traps.scenario: Someone manually coded a cost allocation to 7BZ11.
traps.explain: TRAP: 7BZ11 = system-generated CSO journals ONLY. Manual coding to 7BZ11 is NEVER correct. Must be flagged and referred to Finance.

traps.scenario: Plant hire invoice for excavator — coded to 74183 Fuel (restricted account).
traps.explain: TRAP: 74181-74188 are RESTRICTED to Plant Fleet Services Branch only. External excavator hire = 74123.

traps.scenario: Conference accommodation in Melbourne — staff attending LGMA conference.
traps.explain: TRAP: Melbourne = interstate = 73533. NOT 73532 (within QLD only). Conference REGISTRATION is separate → 73541.

traps.scenario: Meals during interstate travel — staff dinner at hotel restaurant, $85.
traps.explain: TRAP: Meals during travel follow HOSPITALITY rules, not the travel account. Restaurant dinner = off-site = 73511. Never code meals to 73533.

traps.scenario: Purchase of office chair — $420, above P&A threshold.
traps.explain: TRAP: Furniture = 72313. NOT 72111 (under $200 only). NOT 73564 (IT equipment). If above capitalisation threshold → Asset Register.

traps.scenario: University course code visible on invoice — staff TAFE reimbursement.
traps.explain: TRAP: University/TAFE fees reimbursed to staff = 73545 Study Assistance. A course code is the giveaway — not general training (73544).

traps.scenario: Greenwaste disposal to Council tip — $650.
traps.explain: TRAP: Greenwaste processing and disposal = 73129. Garbage/bin collection = 73122. Solid waste to landfill = 73130. Mowing = 73126.

traps.scenario: Electrician called to repair depot lighting — $1,200.
traps.explain: TRAP: Electrician services = 73127. NOT 73123 (general maintenance — plumber/pest/painter). NOT 73312 (electricity supply bill).

traps.scenario: New employee — Workers Compensation Insurance journal entry.
traps.explain: TRAP: 71116 WCI = recording only, always nets to nil. System generated. 71241 = actual Work Cover premium payment. 73131 = insurance premiums.

traps.scenario: Promotional items for park event — branded water bottles, $800.
traps.explain: TRAP: Promotional items = 73553, coordinated through Marketing. NOT 73552 (advertising). NOT 73513 (employee gifts).

traps.scenario: Insurance premium annual payment — $12,000.
traps.explain: TRAP: Insurance PREMIUMS = 73131. Excess/damage NOT covered by insurance = 73132-73137. Insurance RECOVERIES = 64211 (revenue).

traps.scenario: Damage payment after Council mower hit a fence — $800 reimbursement to property owner.
traps.explain: TRAP: Minor damage claims for Council activity damaging non-Council property = 73438. Insurance excess = 73132-73137. Insurance premiums = 73131.

traps.scenario: Gas supply bill for depot kitchen — $340.
traps.explain: TRAP: Gas supply = 73311. Electricity = 73312. Internal rates = 7B111. Telecommunications = 73313.

traps.scenario: Adecco agency invoice for temporary admin support — $3,800.
traps.explain: TRAP: Adecco is an employment agency. ALL agency invoices = 73214. Never 71113 (Council direct temps) or 71118 (temporary appointments via payroll).

traps.scenario: Fuel card transaction — diesel, not yet allocated to correct account.
traps.explain: TRAP: Fuel card PENDING = 72118. Must be cleared to the correct expense account. 74183 is RESTRICTED to Plant Fleet Services — never use it.

traps.scenario: P-Card transaction — not yet allocated to correct account.
traps.explain: TRAP: Credit card PENDING = 72119. Must be cleared before period end. 72118 is fuel card pending — different pending account.

traps.scenario: 73215 coded on a Parks invoice — is this correct for Parks?
traps.explain: TRAP: 73215 Alliance Contracts is RESTRICTED to Logan Water only. If a Parks invoice is coded here, it is miscoded — should be 73211 or 73212.

traps.scenario: Contractor implementing an IT system to Council specifications, supervised by Council staff.
traps.explain: TRAP: Supervised by Council + implementing known system = CONTRACTOR, not consultant. Missing the 'unsupervised' element means it fails the 4-element test. Use 73211/73212.

traps.scenario: Internal photocopying charges — journal entry $120.
traps.explain: TRAP: Internal photocopies = 7BZ21. External printing/stationery = 73563. Internal other fees = 7B123.

traps.scenario: Street lighting infrastructure charge from electricity supplier.
traps.explain: TRAP: Street lighting infrastructure charge = 73318 (separate from regular electricity). Regular electricity = 73312. Electrical maintenance = 73127.

traps.scenario: Regulatory fee paid to industry ombudsman — $2,400.
traps.explain: TRAP: Regulatory fees (industry regulators, ombudsman) = 73434. Other fees/charges = 73433. Fines/penalties = 73431. Commissions = 73432.

fbt.scenario: Morning tea — biscuits and tea at team meeting in Council office boardroom.
fbt.explain: On-site, light refreshments, working meeting, no alcohol = 73512 Non-FBT. All 4 Reason H factors support 73512.

fbt.scenario: Staff farewell lunch at a restaurant — 12 attendees, $480.
fbt.explain: Off-site restaurant = 73511 FBT. Reason H: off-premises → automatic 73511 regardless of other factors.

fbt.scenario: Staff farewell — morning tea on-site with cake, no alcohol.
fbt.explain: On-site farewell morning tea with simple food, no alcohol, during work hours = 73512 Non-FBT.

fbt.scenario: Park Rangers BBQ for Honorary Rangers and Bushcare volunteers.
fbt.explain: Rangers BBQ = 73511 FBT. Reason C — social/recreational function. Social nature makes it FBT.

fbt.scenario: ELT leadership dinner at external venue — wine served.
fbt.explain: Off-site + alcohol = 73511 FBT. Two Reason H factors (off-premises, alcohol) both point to 73511.

fbt.scenario: Working lunch — sandwiches delivered to meeting room for all-day workshop.
fbt.explain: On-site, working meeting, sandwiches (light food), during work hours, no alcohol = 73512 Non-FBT.

fbt.scenario: Conference meals — employees dining on-site at conference venue.
fbt.explain: Conference meals for employees on-site = 73512 Non-FBT. The conference venue is treated as 'on premises'.

fbt.scenario: Christmas party — all costs including venue, catering, decorations, DJ.
fbt.explain: Christmas party = ALWAYS 73511 FBT. All costs for the event go to 73511, no exceptions.

fbt.scenario: Flowers sent to employee who had a baby — $45.
fbt.explain: Employee gift, infrequent, under $300 = 73513 Employee Reward & Recognition. Minor benefit exemption = no FBT.

fbt.scenario: Employee gift basket — $350 value, one-off recognition.
fbt.explain: Employee gift ≥$300 = 73513 but FBT APPLIES (expense benefit). Still coded to 73513, but FBT must be reported.

fbt.scenario: Catering by Logan Entertainment Centre for staff farewell function.
fbt.explain: Internal LEC catering for farewell function = 7B221 (Internal Hospitality FBT). Farewell = social = FBT. Use 7B221 because provider is internal LCC.

fbt.scenario: Nibbles from LEC Corporate Catalogue for on-site working meeting.
fbt.explain: Internal snack-type nibbles at working meeting = 7B222 (Internal Hospitality Non-FBT). On-site, light refreshments, working = no FBT.

fbt.scenario: Awards night dinner — Employee Excellence Awards at external venue.
fbt.explain: Employee years of service/excellence awards functions = 73514 Employee Functions & Awards.

fbt.scenario: Guest speaker fee at community park event — $500.
fbt.explain: Speaker and presenter costs for community events = 73515 Presenter & Entertainer Fees (Non-FBT).

fbt.scenario: Lunch at restaurant for visiting dignitary — $180.
fbt.explain: Off-site meal for dignitary/external guest = 73511 FBT. Any off-site hospitality = 73511, regardless of who is being hosted.

fbt.scenario: Pizza ordered for team working late on-site during emergency response.
fbt.explain: On-site food during work = 73512 Non-FBT. Even though it's pizza (more than biscuits), it's on-premises, during work, for a working purpose.

fbt.scenario: Non-employee gift — thank-you hamper for external volunteer, $120.
fbt.explain: Non-employee gifts = 73553 Promotional Items. Must go via Marketing & Communication Branch. Employee gifts = 73513.

fbt.scenario: BBQ lunch at Council depot for all staff — end of year celebration.
fbt.explain: End of year celebration/social event = 73511 FBT. Even if on Council premises, the social/recreational purpose (Reason C) makes it FBT.

fbt.scenario: Morning tea for community volunteers at park cleanup event.
fbt.explain: Light refreshments at a working/community event, on-site, no alcohol = 73512 Non-FBT.

fbt.scenario: Bottle of wine given to retiring staff member — $60.
fbt.explain: Employee gift (wine), infrequent, under $300 = 73513 Employee Reward & Recognition. Minor benefit = no FBT.

fbt.scenario: Staff end-of-year lunch at a club — $2,800, beer and wine included.
fbt.explain: Off-site + alcohol + social function = 73511. Three Reason H factors all point to FBT. This is functionally a Christmas party.

fbt.scenario: Catering for Council workshop held at LEC — sandwiches and tea, no alcohol.
fbt.explain: Internal LCC venue (LEC) + light refreshments + working meeting + no alcohol = 7B222 Internal Hospitality Non-FBT.

fbt.scenario: Gift card $400 for employee 10-year service award.
fbt.explain: Years of service awards = 73514 Employee Functions & Awards. ≥$300 gift = FBT applies but correct account is 73514 for service milestones.

fbt.scenario: Morning tea for training day — muffins and coffee purchased from local bakery.
fbt.explain: Light refreshments at training event (working context), purchased externally, no alcohol = 73512. The training itself is 73544, but the food is separate.
